cb_layout: c0:input_rm c1:tilized(persistent) c2:gamma c3:beta c4:eps c5:scaler c6:mean c7:den c16:normalized c17:output_rm c24:sq_sum c25:tmp

description: tilize + untilize identity passthrough, full reader/compute/writer implementation

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, 32 sticks per tile-row, push Ct pages per block. Gamma/beta/eps/scaler fills deferred to later stages.
tilize helper cb0->cb1, identity copy via copy_tile from persistent cb1 to cb16, untilize helper cb16->cb17. Per-sample loop with cb_tilized pop at end.
TensorAccessor for output RM sticks, wait Ct pages per tile-row, write 32 sticks via noc_async_write, pop Ct pages.
Fixed: changed namespace NAMESPACE/void MAIN to void kernel_main() per tt-metal convention

cb_summary: c0: reader pushes Ct per tile-row / tilize waits+pops Ct per block. c1: tilize pushes Ht*Ct / compute waits Ht*Ct then pops Ht*Ct. c16: compute pushes Ct per tile-row / untilize waits+pops Ct. c17: untilize pushes Ct per tile-row / writer waits+pops Ct.

details: compute kernel include path wrong: compute_kernel_api/common.h not found. Need api/compute/ prefix.

description: Compute kernel uses wrong include paths: compute_kernel_api/ should be api/compute/

change: Fixed include paths from compute_kernel_api/ to api/compute/

cb_summary: c0:Ct/Ct c1:Ht*Ct/Ht*Ct c16:Ct/Ct c17:Ct/Ct - all balanced

design_deviations: fixed compute kernel include paths from compute_kernel_api/ to api/compute/

description: Per-group mean computation via reduce_tile and broadcast-subtract from input. Reader adds scaler fill.

notes: Session 2 resuming at stage group_mean_subtract. Previous session completed data_pipeline and began group_scaler mask approach for sub-tile groups.

description: Per-group mean via mul_tiles with group_scaler mask + reduce_tile, then sub_tiles_bcast_scalar. Handles sub-tile groups (C/G<32).

fix: Added group_scaler_tensor param, CB26 for group scaler masks (G*Ct pages), expanded cb_mean to G pages, updated reader CT/RT args for group_scaler TensorAccessor, changed compute CT args to [Ht,Ct,G,N]
Added _prepare_group_scaler() to create per-group mask tiles, pass group_scaler_device to program descriptor and generic_op tensor list, removed C/G%32 validation

approach: Added group_scaler TensorAccessor CT args, load G*Ct group_scaler mask tiles into CB26 at startup, fill CB5 with reduce scaler 1.0 via generate_reduce_scaler, updated RT args to include group_scaler_addr and group_scaler_num_tiles

change: Added K (elements per group) as runtime arg between group_scaler_num_tiles and eps_packed
reason: Reader needs K to compute 1/K for reduce scaler CB, since group_scaler mask now uses binary 1/0 values instead of 1/K

change: Updated CB5 docstring from value 1.0 to value 1/K
reason: Scaler CB now holds 1/K since group_scaler mask uses binary 1/0

change: Added _bf16_packed_scalar helper and struct import for packing 1/K as double-packed bf16 uint32
reason: Reader needs pre-packed bf16 1/K value for generate_reduce_scaler since K is shape-dependent

change: Replaced K runtime arg with inv_K_packed (pre-packed bf16 1/K) in reader RT args
reason: Reader passes this directly to generate_reduce_scaler without needing float conversion on device

approach: Added inv_K_packed runtime arg, will use it for generate_reduce_scaler instead of hardcoded 1.0
Changed generate_reduce_scaler to use inv_K_packed (1/K) from runtime arg instead of hardcoded 1.0

Full Stage 2 compute: Phase0 tilize, Phase1 per-group mean via mul_tiles(x,binary_mask)+reduce_tile with accumulator save/reload through cb_mean, Phase2 subtract via constructing per-tile mean_tile=sum_g(mean_g*mask) with mul_tiles_bcast_scalar+add_tiles then sub_tiles, Phase3 untilize. Handles sub-tile groups correctly.

Fixed critical FIFO bug: moved intermediate reduce accumulator from cb_mean to cb_sq_sum (CB24). cb_sq_sum used for push/pop per reduce iteration, final result copied to cb_mean only after all tiles processed for a group. Phase2 also uses cb_sq_sum as temp for mul_bcast_scalar output to avoid colliding with cb_normalized.

summary: All CBs balanced: cb_input_rm Ct/Ct per tile-row, cb_tilized Ht*Ct push/pop per sample, cb_scaler+cb_group_scaler persistent never-popped, cb_sq_sum used as accumulator with push/pop each iter then moved to cb_mean, cb_tmp push/pop each mul+reduce or mul+add cycle, cb_mean G pushes per sample + G pop at end, cb_normalized Ct reserve+pack+push then untilize pop per tile-row, cb_output_rm balanced by writer
reduce_init_short not declared in scope - wrong function name

hypothesis: reduce_init_short does not exist as a standalone function. Need to check the correct API for re-initializing reduce after copy_tile. The reduce_helpers_compute.hpp has reduce_init_short_with_dt. The raw API in reduce.h may have a different name.

fix: Replaced nonexistent reduce_init_short with full reduce_init call after copy_tile accumulator reload. Full reduce_init reconfigures unpack+math+pack which is safe.

upstream_fixes: group_norm.py: changed group_scaler from 1/K to binary 1/0
program_descriptor: added group_scaler_tensor param, CB26, expanded cb_mean to G pages, added inv_K_packed RT arg, _bf16_packed_scalar helper
design_deviations: Used binary 1/0 group_scaler mask instead of 1/K mask - 1/K moved to reduce scaler CB
Used cb_sq_sum as intermediate accumulator instead of cb_mean to avoid FIFO ordering issues
Used full reduce_init instead of reduce_init_short for re-init after copy_tile

description: Add variance computation (E[x^2] - mean^2), rsqrt(var+eps), and multiply centered data by denominator. Output = (x - mean) / sqrt(var + eps).

change: Convert eps_packed from float32-bits to double-packed bf16 format for generate_reduce_scaler
reason: Reader will use generate_reduce_scaler to fill cb_eps tile, which requires double-packed bf16 uint32

approach: Added generate_reduce_scaler(cb_eps, packed_eps) to fill eps CB with double-packed bf16 epsilon value at startup

change: Expanded cb_den from 1 to G pages
reason: Need to store G denominator tiles (one rsqrt(var+eps) per group) for the normalize pass

description: Add variance computation and full normalization without affine transform

issue: cb_normalized used as temp buffer in den_tile accumulation while also being reserved for final output tiles. push_back and pop_front inside the Ct reservation corrupts the FIFO.
fix: Use cb_input_rm CB0 as temp for den_tile group accumulation since reader has finished all RM reads during tilize phase

approach: Fixed cb_normalized FIFO corruption: replaced cb_normalized with cb_input_rm as temp buffer in den_tile group accumulation loop

issue: cb_input_rm is NOT safe as temp during Phase 4 because reader runs on separate thread and may be pushing sticks for next sample. Need a CB that is truly unused.
fix: Use cb_gamma CB2 as temp instead - gamma is not loaded in Stage 3 normalize

approach: Changed den_tile temp CB from cb_input_rm to cb_gamma CB2 - cb_input_rm unsafe due to reader thread concurrency, cb_gamma is truly unused in normalize stage
Added cb_gamma constant declaration for use as scratch buffer in den_tile accumulation

details: All CBs balanced. cb_gamma used as 1-tile temp for den_tile group accum with matching push/pop. cb_normalized only receives pack_tile within Ct reservation. No cross-kernel CB conflicts.

error: add_tiles_bcast_scalar_init_short not declared in scope at line 223

fix: Replace with init_bcast<ELWADD, SCALAR>(cb_tmp, cb_eps, cb_den)

error: Max diff 62.8125. Output values in raw input range not normalized range. Normalization not taking effect.

issue: Output is input*sqrt(K). den_tile appears to be sqrt(K) instead of 1/sqrt(var+eps). E[x^2] computation likely off by factor K, or Phase 2/3 corrupts state used by Phase 4.
fix: Debug with DPRINT to check mean and E[x^2] values directly

approach: Added dprint.h include for debugging numerical mismatch

issue: REDUCE_SCALAR applies scaler twice (row+col stages) so effective scaler is scaler^2. We pass 1/K but need 1/sqrt(K). DPRINT confirmed mean is K times too small. Stage 2 passed by luck because mean values were within atol.
fix: Change inv_K_packed from 1/K to 1/sqrt(K) in program descriptor

reason: REDUCE_SCALAR applies scaler at both row and col reduction stages so effective scaler is scaler^2. Need 1/sqrt(K) so effective is 1/K.

approach: Removed all DPRINT debug statements after confirming scaler fix works
